paper.title: CutVerse: A Compositional GUI Agents Benchmark for Media Post-Production Editing
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The acquired default-branch commit is dated 20 days after immutable arXiv v1 and is therefore an official post-v1 snapshot, not demonstrated paper-time code. The repository's only observed tag, Preview, points to a different commit. The archive was pinned, hashed, integrity-checked, and spot-checked but not deeply audited by the source-acquisition worker.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded and verified the complete immutable arXiv v1 PDF and HTML, extracted the 30-page PDF with pdftotext -layout, and pinned, downloaded, hashed, and integrity-checked the complete official default-branch repository archive. No deep paper review, result reproduction, parser/grader audit, or capability/reliability/readiness claim is made.
local_storage_note: The PDF, byte-exact official HTML, and release ZIP are ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, API metadata, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable or pinned URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
